text:
Deep in the heart of the jungle, there lived a man named Leo. Leo had always had a passion for flying. Not birds, thankfully. He loved soaring through the clouds in his homemade plane.

The jungle was his territory. It was thick, verdant, and full of strange creatures. There was a baboon that spoke in riddles, a monkey that could play guitar at nightclubs, and a touguкаe that could turn invisible.

Every year, Leo would go on an adventure. He'd search for the rumored Flying Dragon Fruit. It was said to glow with an otherworldly light. Leo had a vision of himself soaring through the sky eating fruit plucked from the heads of monkeys. It was a ridiculous dream, yet it inspired him.

One day while hiking, Leo stumbled upon a clearing. At the center sat a serene pond, surrounded by orchids. A flock of hummingbirds was there waiting. Leo swooped down, scooped a fruit, and flew away
